name: Pony Testing Co., Ltd.
summary: Pony Testing Co., Ltd. provides testing services and solutions in China and internationally. It offers testing services in the areas of health, safety, and environmental protection, such as food, agricultural products, pharmaceuticals, health products and cosmetics, water quality, occupational health, genetic, environmental monitoring, and medical inspection. The company also provides testing in area of trade compliance, including RoHS testing in electrical and electronic products, factory inspection, products acceptance, hazardous substances testing and control, WEEE evaluation services, REACH directive technological services, ErP test, and reliability assessment, as well as safety, EMC, and failure analysis. In addition, it offers services in products quality identification field comprising testing of toys, children products, daily consumables, textiles, clothing, leather products, shoes, automobiles, and electrical and electronic products. The company is headquartered in Beijing, China.
